title: giliastrum incisum
intro: Giliastrum incisum, also known as incised gilia or cutleaf gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, colds, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Giliastrum incisum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Giliastrum incisum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, flowers, or roots.
